description: Yan Zhang discusses Roam, a global roaming network that offers secure, seamless connectivity by integrating public Wi-Fi. The network has grown to over 600,000 nodes and nearly 800,000 users in 200 countries, addressing issues with traditional public Wi-Fi.
topic_summary: Roam provides a decentralized network solution for global connectivity, leveraging public Wi-Fi and blockchain technology to enhance user experience and security. The presentation highlights the network's growth, partnerships, and future plans, including a token airdrop and new services.
